title: User-type profile YAML — protocol 1.0.0
description: Versioned copy of profile.schema.json snapshotted at protocol 1.0.0. The protocol loader uses this for stage-1/stage-3 validation; the un-versioned `profile.schema.json` remains the canonical reference for the current-shape strict check used by the resolver's downstream Ajv pass. Both must stay in lockstep for the v1.0.0 baseline — the CI changelog gate (`scripts/protocol-changelog-check.ts`) enforces that any schema change is paired with a `src/core/protocol/changelog.md` entry, and any future bump from 1.0.0 will introduce a new versioned file (`profile-1.1.0.json`) rather than mutate this one.

protocol_version.description: Cadence protocol version this profile targets. Optional — omitted profiles default to '1.0.0' (the v8.5.x ecosystem baseline). Loader normalizes '1' / '1.2' to full triplet before validation.

profile.description: Profile identifier. Must match the file's basename (without `.yaml`); the resolver enforces filename ↔ field equivalence after schema validation.

description.description: Human-readable one-line summary surfaced by `profile show` / `profile list` and the init prompt.

codex_passes.description: Number of Codex review passes per risk tier. Each value is an integer in [0, 5]; 0 means skip Codex review entirely for that tier.
